quotes.text: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
quotes.author: Philippians 4:13

quotes.text: Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
quotes.author: Proverbs 3:5

quotes.text: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom.
quotes.author: Proverbs 9:10

quotes.text: Let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in heaven.
quotes.author: Matthew 5:16

quotes.text: For I know the plans I have for you, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.
quotes.author: Jeremiah 29:11

quotes.text: Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the Lord your God will be with you wherever you go.
quotes.author: Joshua 1:9

quotes.text: Love is patient, love is kind. It does not envy, it does not boast, it is not proud.
quotes.author: 1 Corinthians 13:4

quotes.text: Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord, not for human masters.
quotes.author: Colossians 3:23

quotes.text: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.
quotes.author: Romans 12:2

quotes.text: You are the light of the world. A town built on a hill cannot be hidden.
quotes.author: Matthew 5:14

quotes.text: The soul that sees beauty may sometimes walk alone.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.text: To teach is to touch a life forever.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire.
quotes.author: W.B. Yeats

quotes.text: The greatest among you will be your servant.
quotes.author: Matthew 23:11

quotes.text: Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate; only love can do that.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.text: In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God.
quotes.author: 1 Thessalonians 5:18

quotes.text: Character is doing the right thing when nobody is looking.
quotes.author: J.C. Watts

quotes.text: You have brains in your head and feet in your shoes. You can steer yourself any direction you choose.
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Do justice, love kindness, and walk humbly with your God.
quotes.author: Micah 6:8

quotes.text: The mediocre teacher tells. The good teacher explains. The superior teacher demonstrates. The great teacher inspires.
quotes.author: William Arthur Ward

quotes.text: Not all of us can do great things. But we can do small things with great love.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.text: Give, and it will be given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together and running over.
quotes.author: Luke 6:38

quotes.text: The function of education is to teach one to think intensively and to think critically. Intelligence plus character — that is the goal of true education.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.text: Start children off on the way they should go, and even when they are old they will not turn from it.
quotes.author: Proverbs 22:6
